answer:
We factor each term using the identity  
\[
k^4 + \frac14 = \left(k^2 + k + \frac12\right)\left(k^2 - k + \frac12\right).
\]  
Then the product telescopes:  
\[
\frac{\prod_{k=1}^{n} \left((2k)^4 + \frac14\right)}{\prod_{k=1}^{n} \left((2k-1)^4 + \frac14\right)} 
= \frac{\prod_{k=1}^{n} \left((2k)^2 + 2k + \frac12\right)\left((2k)^2 - 2k + \frac12\right)}
{\prod_{k=1}^{n} \left((2k-1)^2 + (2k-1) + \frac12\right)\left((2k-1)^2 - (2k-1) + \frac12\right)}.
\]
